mapper.sql: id, title, artist_id, album_id, track_number, file_path, cover_url, format, duration_seconds, bitrate_kbps, sample_rate_hz, channels, file_size_bytes, lyrics, extra_metadata, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at

t.id, t.title, t.duration_seconds AS duration, t.format, t.bitrate_kbps AS bitrate, t.sample_rate_hz AS sampleRate, t.file_size_bytes AS fileSizeBytes, t.cover_url AS coverUrl, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.artist_id AS artistId, ar.name AS artistName, t.album_id AS albumId, al.title AS albumTitle, al.cover_url AS albumCoverUrl
mapper.select:
SELECT , (uf.user_id IS NOT NULL) AS favorited FROM track t LEFT JOIN artist ar ON ar.id = t.artist_id AND ar.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN album al ON al.id = t.album_id AND al.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN user_favorite uf ON uf.track_id = t.id AND uf.user_id = #{userId} WHERE t.is_deleted = 0
AND (t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ar.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR al.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND t.artist_id = #{artistId} AND t.album_id = #{albumId} AND t.format = #{format} ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT FROM track t LEFT JOIN artist ar ON ar.id = t.artist_id AND ar.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN album al ON al.id = t.album_id AND al.is_deleted = 0 WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.album_id = #{albumId} ORDER BY t.track_number ASC, t.id ASC

SELECT FROM track t LEFT JOIN artist ar ON ar.id = t.artist_id AND ar.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN album al ON al.id = t.album_id AND al.is_deleted = 0 WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.artist_id = #{artistId} ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT FROM playlist_track pt JOIN track t ON t.id = pt.track_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN artist ar ON ar.id = t.artist_id AND ar.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN album al ON al.id = t.album_id AND al.is_deleted = 0 WHERE pt.playlist_id = #{playlistId} ORDER BY pt.order_index ASC

SELECT FROM user_favorite uf JOIN track t ON t.id = uf.track_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN artist ar ON ar.id = t.artist_id AND ar.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN album al ON al.id = t.album_id AND al.is_deleted = 0 WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.favorited_at DESC
